patched_src:
from qiskit import *
qc = QuantumCircuit(1)
qc.u1(0.24, 0)
qc.measure_all()
print(qc.decompose())
rationale: The original code decomposes the quantum circuit but does not measure any qubits. To ensure the circuit can be executed and observed, a measurement operation is added at the end of the circuit.
